faq.title: Have Questions?
faq.subtitle: Check our FAQ
faq.q1: What are the team's primary research areas?
faq.a1: We focus on Big Data analysis, predictive modeling using Machine Learning, and optimizing Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) to enhance logistics efficiency through data-driven insights.
faq.q2: Which technologies and frameworks do we utilize?
faq.a2: We utilize a modern stack including React, Node.js, Python, and various AI/Machine Learning frameworks to build robust and scalable systems.
faq.q3: How does competitive programming influence our work?
faq.a3: It sharpens our problem-solving skills, helps us write highly efficient algorithms, and fosters a culture of technical excellence.
faq.q4: Are we open to professional collaborations?
faq.a4: Yes, we actively seek collaborations with academic institutions and industrial partners to solve complex real-world problems.
faq.q5: What makes our software solutions unique?
faq.a5: Our solutions combine deep academic research with practical implementation, focusing on performance, scalability, and measurable impact.
faq.q6: Where can I access our publications and source code?
faq.a6: You can access our research papers in the Publications section of this site, and explore some of our open-source projects on GitHub.

builtToBoost.description: Boost FPS and responsiveness with IQ Optimizer, no complicated setup required.

intro.title: What It Does & How It Helps
intro.p1: IQ Optimizer upgrades your system for better in-game performance on any PC, from low-end laptops to high-end gaming setups. It boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves responsiveness by stopping unnecessary background tasks and fine-tuning registry values to maximize system efficiency.
intro.p2: Just pick a plan (Free or Premium), install, and optimize in one click. No complex setup. No confusion, just smoother, faster gameplay.
